name: devscope
description: Real-time monitoring dashboard for Claude Code developer sessions

scripts.test: cd packages/backend && for f in $(find src -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:backend: cd packages/backend && for f in $(find src -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
